info.heading: Important Notice
info.freeDelivery1: Products with the "free delivery" flag enabled are NOT counted towards the cart value. This matches Shopware's default behavior — Shopware itself excludes these items when calculating shipping costs.
info.freeDelivery2: Example: With a €50 threshold, a free-delivery item (€40) does not count. Only the regular item (€20) is considered — so €30 remain.
info.shippingMethod: The plugin only supports shipping methods using calculation by cart price that include a price tier with €0 shipping cost.
info.description: Free shipping progress bar in the offcanvas cart and checkout summary.
